_comment: Positions ledger for report.py. The trading session maintains it: a buy APPENDS, a sell REMOVES. sleeve = swing|momentum (NO 'legacy' — every position is judged each run with a take-profit / trail / hold / thesis-check action; treat the book as an income / grow-the-balance portfolio). Stops are TRAILING: a winner carries a GTC stop ~15% below its running high, ratcheted UP only and never below entry, so it can only ever be sold for a locked-in gain; underwater names carry NO price stop and are thesis-managed (sell only if the thesis breaks, else cull at the monthly rebalance). Options positions (sleeve:'options') may carry a 'manual_hold_override' field to suspend ONLY the mechanical -50% price stop (see CLAUDE.md HARD RULE 8) — settable/clearable only by a genuinely interactive session with a real, live Ryan turn, never by an automated run (same bar as HARD RULE 9).

positions._note: Autonomous entry (HARD RULE 8 checklist, options-automation run 15:19Z): technical signal -- momentum top-decile (#6, mom12-1 657%, RSI14 43 not overbought, confirmed rising >200MA); thesis intact -- $19B 20yr Anthropic AI-datacenter lease at TeraWulf's Hawesville KY campus, Rosenblatt/Needham/Morgan Stanley all hiked PTs to Buy/Overweight this week, $450M Abernathy stake sale funding buildout; IV ~105% (elevated but not earnings-driven -- no imminent report), liquid (OI 8631, ~$0.05 spread on $1.30 mark); settled cash covers it; daily loss cap not hit ($0 realized today); sleeve stays under 15% cap (~$374 of ~$3701, ~10%) even counting the ACHR LEAP. FILL CONFIRMED (next run, 15:46Z check via get_option_orders): order 6a60df70-d953-4b6b-abfc-1bc4d678aa78 state=filled, executed 2026-07-22T15:32:32Z @ $1.30, matches get_option_positions. Mark at confirmation ~$1.235 (-5% from entry), no exit condition close. Same run: no new entry made -- this is still the same 15:10Z report the WULF entry was drawn from 26min earlier, so a second name off identical data with no new information fails the HARD RULE 8 honesty test; sleeve cap headroom (~$180 to the 15% line) is better preserved for a genuinely fresh signal on a later run. EARNINGS DATE CORRECTED (16:2x Z run, via get_earnings_calendar): WULF Q2 report is VERIFIED 2026-08-05 AM (not the ~08-07 placeholder used at entry) -- 2 days earlier than assumed. Must close by ~2026-07-31 (3 trading days before the print), not 08-04/05 -- do NOT hold through the print. Same run: mark $1.22 (-6% from entry, DTE 30) -- no exit condition fired (not near -50%, DTE>14, earnings not yet within 3 trading days). Screened the day's fresh RSI2 swing setups (ABNB, CRWD, PANW, AXP, MRNA, DDOG) for a possible 2nd entry -- none passed the full checklist: CRWD/PANW/DDOG/AXP -- a ~0.35-delta ~30-45DTE call costs $400-800+/contract on these higher-priced names, blowing the $150/trade cap; AXP also reports earnings 2026-07-24 (2 days out); MRNA reports 2026-07-31 (9 days out, would force an exit almost immediately, not an intentional earnings play); ABNB's $150-155 strikes at 08/21 exp price $265-410/contract (still over cap) and its 08-06 earnings would force closing the trade after only ~9 days -- none clear the bar. No new entry this run per 'any doubt = skip.' EXIT CHECK (options-automation run, ~15:15-15:20Z, fresh 07-23 report): mark $1.05 (-19% from entry), DTE 29 (>14), earnings still verified 2026-08-05 AM / must close by ~07-31 (not yet within the 3-trading-day window) -- no exit condition fired. Realized options P&L today $0 (get_option_orders empty since 00:00Z), daily loss cap not hit. ENTRY SCREEN (same run, options-sleeve now ~9.6% of account ($350/$3639), back under the 15% cap): screened the fresh report's options-candidates list -- calls LITE/MU/TSEM (underlying $250-985/sh, a ~0.35-delta 30-45DTE call runs well over $150/contract) and AEHR ($90.7/sh, IV~140%, $95-105 strikes priced $1100-1550/contract, OI single digits to 52) all blown on cost and/or liquidity; puts RBLX (08/28 41-44 strikes, delta -0.24 to -0.43, OI 0-13 -- fails the real-OI bar) and SMR (08/28 8-9.5 strikes, delta -0.36 to -0.60, only the $8.5 strike clears OI>500 (660) but its spread is ~$0.43 wide on a ~$0.98 mid, ~44% -- fails the tight-spread bar) both fail liquidity despite fitting under the $150 cap on price alone. No candidate cleared the full technical+thesis+IV+liquidity stack -- no new entry this run per 'any doubt = skip.' EXIT CHECK + ENTRY SCREEN (options-automation run, ~15:45-15:48Z, same 07-23 15:13Z morning report as the heartbeat run): WULF mark $1.075 (-17.3% from $1.30 entry), DTE 29 (>14), earnings verified 2026-08-05 AM / must close by ~07-31 -- not yet within the 3-trading-day window -- no exit fired. ACHR untouched (manual_hold_override active, not re-litigated). Realized options P&L today still $0, daily loss cap not hit. Screened this run's swing setups (ABNB/CRWD/AXP/DLTR/PANW/MRNA/SBUX/DDOG/V, all $100-350/sh) and the 200MA-confirmed momentum top-decile names (LITE $826, AEHR $88, MU $984, TSEM $253, AAOI $112, VIAV $42, COHR $312, ALAB $323, LRCX $318, AMD $539, MRVL $206, LASR $71, FCEL $23.60, DELL $440, AMAT $562, CRDO $230, INTC $100.60) for a 2nd entry: checked full chains on INTC (~30-45DTE ~0.35-delta calls $850-950/contract on ~98% IV), FCEL ($295-380/contract even at the cheapest strikes, OI only 2-76, spreads up to 43% -- fails liquidity too), and VIAV ($410/contract, 0.48 delta at the nearest OTM strike) -- every priced candidate blew the $150/trade cap; the rest are higher-priced than INTC/VIAV so fail on cost by inspection alone (IV across the board running ~95-160%, inflating premiums well past a $150 single-contract budget). No candidate cleared the full technical+thesis+IV+liquidity stack -- no new entry this run per 'any doubt = skip.'

Reconciliation (options-automation run, 19:38-19:52Z): placed_agent='user' on the fill (2026-07-20T19:38:22Z, $2.47/contract, $247 premium) -- Ryan bought this himself in the app, automation did not place it and was not consulted. Long-dated LEAP (18mo out, deep ITM-trending strike $5 vs underlying ~$5.30), a materially different risk profile than the sleeve's normal 30-45 DTE/~0.35-delta plays -- not gated by the HARD RULE 8 entry checklist since it wasn't an autonomous entry. Missing from the ledger until this run; added to match the broker, no trade action taken. FLAGGING FOR RYAN: this purchase pushed total options-sleeve mark value to ~$691 on a ~$3601 account (~19.2%), over the HARD RULE 8 ~15% sleeve cap (~$540) -- automation will skip new option entries until this comes back under cap. Mechanical -50%/+50-100% exit rules are not being auto-applied to this LEAP given the distinct risk profile and that Ryan placed it deliberately; flag if you want it treated differently.

manual_hold_override.note: Ryan, live turn 2026-07-22: 'I'll handle the achr leap. Just leave it be' -- Ryan manages this Jan-2028 LEAP personally. NO mechanical exits of any kind (not the -50% cut, not TP, not DTE) and no re-litigating it in alerts or sessions. It remains counted against the 15% options-sleeve cap (conservative default; Ryan did not carve it out), so automation stays paused on new autonomous entries while the sleeve is over cap.

positions._note: Ryan, live turn 2026-07-20: 'Don't sell iren. Good stock just volatile due to the large rise in ai play. People just selling down for profit and risks but still a good longterm play' -- conviction long-term hold; reclassified swing->momentum so RSI2-bounce exits stop firing on it. Manage by thesis (HARD RULE 7) and the monthly rebalance only. Reconciled 2026-07-20T17:30Z (options-automation run): Ryan bought 5 more shares himself in-app (placed_agent=user, $40.195 fill, 2026-07-20T16:10Z) -- broker now shows 11.810007sh @ blended $42.99 avg cost; ledger drift fixed to match, no trade action taken by automation.

Swing leg of Ryan's 'do both' RBRK play (paired with the 8/21 90C). Same fast exit: bank the pop at ~85.50 / RSI2>=70; entry on the 4-red-close oversold at the 77-78 pullback zone, thesis INTACT. Distinct from the 1sh RKLB momentum position - do not confuse tickers.

_resolved_flags.resolution: Cleared per HARD RULE 9(a) by the interactive session that PLACED both orders: Ryan typed 'Approve' (real user turn, 2026-07-14 ~15:55Z) authorizing the presented batch (SELL CRWD 0.4sh / BUY LLY $150 / BUY MRK 1sh), and the fills match that batch exactly (MRK leg was rejected for buying power). The flagging run was correct to flag - it could not see this session. Ledger entries already match the broker.

_resolved_pending_orders.resolution: Options-automation run confirmed all 8 consolidation-batch market sells (MRK, GOOGL, KO, C, FCX, QCOM, IBKR, RKLB) filled at today's open (2026-07-22 13:30-13:33 UTC), matching the 2026-07-21 Ryan-approved batch order IDs exactly -- verified via get_equity_orders and get_equity_positions (broker book now shows only ACHR/IREN/INOD/IONQ/LIN/CAT/CSCO/RBRK, matching this ledger). Positions removed above; not a new equity decision, just syncing the ledger to already-authorized, already-filled trades. Note: broker shows a residual 0.002540sh FCX dust position (~$0.15, avg cost $59.06 -- a different cost basis than the ledger's $64.61/1sh lot, likely an old fractional remainder unrelated to this sell) -- immaterial, left alone.
